headers._comment: Content-hash-versioned assets (modules carry ?v=<hash>, shared engine likewise). MUST precede the broad no-store rules below — Firebase Hosting applies the FIRST matching rule per header key, so these immutable rules only take effect when listed first. Cuts launch latency and avoids re-fetching (and re-truncating) modules from origin on every load.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.gstatic.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdn.tailwindcss.com https://apis.google.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.cloudfunctions.net https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebasestorage.app https://*.firebaseio.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com
